"use client"; import { zodResolver } from "@hookform/resolvers/zod"; import { useForm } from "react-hook-form"; import { z } from "zod"; import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button"; import { Form, FormControl, FormDescription, FormField, FormItem, FormLabel, } from "@/components/ui/form"; import { Select, SelectContent, SelectItem, SelectTrigger, SelectValue, } from "@/components/ui/select"; import { Switch } from "@/components/ui/switch"; export const title = "Settings Form"; const formSchema = z.object({ language: z.string(), theme: z.string(), emailNotifications: z.boolean(), marketingEmails: z.boolean(), securityAlerts: z.boolean(), twoFactorAuth: z.boolean(), }); const Example = () => { const form = useForm>({ resolver: zodResolver(formSchema), defaultValues: { language: "en", theme: "system", emailNotifications: true, marketingEmails: false, securityAlerts: true, twoFactorAuth: false, }, }); function onSubmit(values: z.infer) { console.log(values); } return (

Preferences

Manage your application preferences

( Language Choose your preferred language. )} /> ( Theme Select your preferred theme. )} />

Notifications

(
Email Notifications Receive notifications via email
)} /> (
Marketing Emails Receive emails about new products and features
)} /> (
Security Alerts Receive alerts about account security
)} />

Security

(
Two-Factor Authentication Add an extra layer of security to your account
)} />
); }; export default Example;
